a:r.a:t: Deep implementation: statistics library, signal framework with 18 intelligence signals, and all 11 deterministic analysis engines - Hazen percentile, OLS regression, adaptive threshold, and more.
Core engineering: writing deterministic algorithms with 308+ unit tests and 15 E2E cases. Every score traces back to an open, readable formula.
Orchestrates the broader workflow: scheduling tasks and managing multi-agent collaboration.
Keeps the project on track across sessions spanning days and weeks.
Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4 with 11 analysis modules.
Electron 33 Collector app, Chrome MV3 Extension, and 7 data adapters: CDP, FileImport, HTMLParse, Browser, Extension, Demo.
